title: FTS pgsz option results in "database disk image is malformed" error
poc: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE vt0 USING fts5(a);
key_bug_features: pgsz option causes database disk image to be malformed
bug_features_seed: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE vt0 USING fts5(a);
UPDATE vt0 SET a = 999999999 WHERE a IS NOT NULL;
